steps.title: Put the equation in standard form
steps.content:
Expand and move all terms to one side.
$$x(x-15)=34$$
$$x^2-15x-34=0$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Find two numbers with product $-34$ and sum $-15$.
$$x^2-15x-34=(x-17)(x+2)$$
So the solutions are $x=17$ and $x=-2$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: A calculator can solve the entered equation $x(x-15)=34$ directly. The positive solution is the value greater than $0$. The answer is 17.
